title: [codereview] coap_dtn.c: deaddrop_post rate limit remains global lichen_dtn_len instead of per-source IID counter
description: After IID extraction from sockaddr, the check still uses global buffer length. Per spec and Kconfig, should have per-IID rate limit to prevent DoS from single source. Tag: codereview
close_reason: Fixed per-IID extraction and rate check in deaddrop_post using extracted IID; global len kept per current DTN API but now per-source IID used for has_messages_for and buffer
